/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libouster_srvs__python.so -o rosidl_generator_py/ouster_srvs/libouster_srvs__python.so CMakeFiles/ouster_srvs__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/ouster_srvs/srv/_get_config_s.c.o CMakeFiles/ouster_srvs__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/ouster_srvs/srv/_set_config_s.c.o CMakeFiles/ouster_srvs__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/ouster_srvs/srv/_get_metadata_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/uocav/ros-workspace/build/ouster_srvs:/opt/ros/foxy/lib libouster_srvs__rosidl_generator_c.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so libouster_srvs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcpputils.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
